conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For our e-commerce site, let's use Shopify. It's the best platform for selling products.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Shopify is turnkey. I'll set up the store and the payment gateways.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We need custom functionality. Let's use WooCommerce on WordPress. It's more flexible.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: WooCommerce gives us full control. I'll set up the PHP environment.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Our products are digital. Let's use Gumroad. It handles digital delivery perfectly.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Gumroad is simple. I'll upload the products and set up the landing pages.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We need inventory management and custom checkout. Let's build with Medusa. It's open-source and headless.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Medusa is flexible. I'll build the custom storefront.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: This is taking too long. Let's just use Shopify. It's the fastest way to launch and we can customize later.

query: What e-commerce platform is the team launching with?
